runtime_policy: exactly main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css under canto-span/
recovery_policy: documentation, research, validation, provenance, tools, and handoff material; no nested ZIPs and no sealed external held-out packet
speaker_packet_policy: README plus separate Speaker A and Speaker B forms; no internal design JSON, parser output, source analysis, or answers
full_suite_policy: runtime ZIP, recovery ZIP, speaker-review ZIP, and key visible audit documents
